rulings.Case Title: MARIA MARANGHI VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Kihagis Deposition And Document Production And For Sanctions Against Kihagi And Her Attorneys Karen Uchiyama And Gregory De L Pena
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday April 30, 2018, line 1. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Kihagis Deposition And Document Production And For Sanctions Against Kihagi And Her Attorneys Karen Uchiyama And Gregory De L Pena Both Plaintiff and Defendant shall be deposed at least 5 days before the trial date of May 14, 2018. (If trial is continued parties may agree on other deposition dates). Plaintiff shall be deposed first; Defendant shall be deposed thereafter. Parties to meet and confer on mutually agreeable dates (if parties cannot agree on a date deposition of Plaintiff shall take place on May 2, 2018 starting at 9:00 a.m. and Deposition of Defendant shall take place on May 7, 2018 starting at 9:00 a.m. Parties to prepare order and present for execution (including agreed upon dates for deposition and the dates provided by the Court) at the time of the hearing. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: 1429 GRANT AVE, LLC, VS. ANDREW LINTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To File X-Complt
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday April 30, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT ANDREW LINTON MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To File cross-complaint GRANTED as follows: Cross-Complainant shall file and serve Amended Cross-Complaint (including new causes of action for equitable indemnity and contribution against new parties) no later than May 4, 2018. Trial date of July 2, 2018 remains. New causes of action in Amended Cross-Complaint (listed above) are bifurcated. Whether trial on the bifurcated causes of action proceeds on July 2, 2018 shall be addressed in department 206 at least 30 days before July 2, 2018, if necessary and proper. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: ARAFAT HERZALLAH VS. NIMER MASSIS ET AL

rulings.Case Title: INTERNATIONAL FEDERATION OF PROFESSIONAL AND VS. ASIAN, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Temporary Restraining Order And An Order To Show Cause
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday April 30, 2018, line 10. Temporary Restraining Order And An Order To Show Cause GRANTED. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: VLADISLAV CHERNOGUZ VS. SILVIA URRUTIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday April 30, 2018, line 4. DEFENDANT SILVIA URRUTIA, JUAN URRUTIA, JOSHUA URRUTIA DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Defendant failed to cite any authority for the proposition that two incidents are not sufficient per SFRO 37.9(a)(1)(B). 2016 late payment incidents settled/waived in the prior case. Remaining two 2017 incidents are not sufficient to constitute "habitual late payment." = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: QIANG WU VS. JESSICA BAYZE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend/Supplement Ud Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday April 30, 2018, line 5. PLAINTIFF QIANG WU MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend/Supplement Ud Complaint OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice to Defendant's current counsel of record. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: SHUJUAN DAI VS. JUDY HONG CHU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday April 30, 2018, line 6. DEFENDANT BINGSEN LI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiency alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Factual disputes are not properly addressed by demurrer. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: WCP II, LLC. VS. SHEILA HARRIS-YOUNG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday April 30, 2018, line 9. PLAINTIFF WCP II, LLC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Summary Judgment Hearing Required to address: (1) is rent due during the time when premises are not usable for indented purpose; (2) the location/cause of sewage flood- within or outside of the space rented by Defendant; (3) who is responsible for sewage repairs and clean up under the lease. = (501/SRB)
